title: Archive Closeout Valid By Construction Closeout
summary: Classify #355 after the first validation-repair-loop reduction slice landed.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Reduce validation-driven repair loops with simpler command and schema shapes
issue_classifications.evidence: archive-plan --prepare-closeout now generates normalized intent satisfaction, closure check, and closeout-distillation fields from simple flags; tests prove dry-run patch output, archive-and-close, and archive-but-keep-lane-open records archive without manual JSON repair.
